plural: Händel (rare/archaic plural; usually used without plural)
notes: Mostly used in singular. 'Handel treiben' means 'to trade'. Can also refer to a specific deal or transaction in informal contexts.

sentences.german: Der internationale Handel ist für viele Länder sehr wichtig.
sentences.english: International trade is very important for many countries.

sentences.german: Der Handel mit Elektronik boomt in diesem Jahr.
sentences.english: The trade in electronics is booming this year.
